name: TXU Energy Free Nights & Solar Days 12 (8 pm)

provenance.notes: Structure and rates from the FILED TXU EFL 'Free Nights & Solar Days 12 (8 pm)', Oncor area, dated 2024-06-11: free Nights 8:00pm-4:59am daily (100% credit on BOTH energy charge AND TDU delivery per the EFL text), Solar Days energy charge 26.30 c/kWh, base charge $9.95/mo, EFL avg 19.5 c/kWh @1000 kWh. Marked estimated because the EFL is Jun-2024-dated; a Jul-2025-dated EFL was not retrievable (generator serves current labels, no archive snapshot). Plan availability and ~19.5-19.8 c/kWh all-in corroborated as of 2025-04-09 by homeenergyclub.com/texas-electricity-companies/txu-energy/free-nights-and-solar-days. Encoding: because nights credit BOTH energy and TDU, Oncor volumetric delivery (5.1248 c/kWh, FILED Jul-2025 Oncor rate sheet) is folded into the day rate (26.30 + 5.1248 = 31.4248 c/kWh) instead of riders_usd_per_kwh, so night imports are genuinely free. fixed_monthly_usd = $9.95 TXU base + $4.23 Oncor fixed ($1.43 customer + $2.80 metering).
